---
title: "UMD Biostatistics: Schedule"
page-layout: full
---

This page contains the schedule and links for lectures, activities, homework, and vignettes for Ecostats Fall 2026. 
I am currently working on updating the lectures and intro specificall so we have more trianing for using r to facilitate doing the statistics easier.

::: {.column-screen-inset-right}

### Week 1: Foundations
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 01 - Introduction - Start with R
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_01/01_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_01/01_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_1_r/01_homework_intro.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: T-Tests (Parametric)](vignettes/01_t_tests_parametric/01_two_sample_ttest.qmd)

#### 02 - Project Design and Graphing data
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_02/02_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_02/class_activity.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 2: Data & Probability
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 03 - Descriptive Stats and Wrangling
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_03/03_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_03/03_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_2_desc_stats/02_homework_stats.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: T-Tests (Non-Parametric)](vignettes/02_t_tests_nonparametric/02_two_sample_welches_ttest.qmd)

#### 04 - Probability and Inference I
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_04/04_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_04/04_class_activity.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 3: Mean Comparisons
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 05 - T-Tests - one - two - paired
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_05/05_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_05/05_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_3_ttest/homework_t_test.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: Correlation](vignettes/03_correlation/04_correlation_analysis.qmd)

#### 06 - Power and Type I and II error
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_06/06_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_06/06_class_activity.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 4: Experimental Design
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 07 - Non Parametric T-Tests
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_07/07_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_07/07_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_4_nonpar/04_homework_nonparametric.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: Regression](vignettes/04_regession/05_linear_regression.qmd)

#### 08 - Study Design and Sampling
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_08/08_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_08/08_class_activity.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 5: Relationship Modeling
::: {layout-ncol=1}
#### 09 - Correlation vs Linear Models
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_09/09_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_09/09_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_5_corr_reg/05_homework_correlation_regression.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: Multiple Linear Regression](vignettes/05_multiple_linear_regression/07_multiple_linear_regression.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 6: Regression & ANOVA
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 10 - Multiple Regression
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_10/10_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_10/10_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_6_mult_reg/06_homework_multiple_regression.qmd)
* [📖 Vignette: One-way ANOVA](vignettes/06_oneway_anova/08_one_way_ANOVA.qmd)

#### 11 - Analysis of Variance
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_11/11_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_11/11_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_7_one_way_anova/07_homework_one_way_anova.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 7: Complex ANOVA & LMM
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 12 - 2 way ANOVA
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_12/12_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_12/12_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_8_factorial_anova/08_homework_factorial_anova.qmd)
* 📖 Vignette: Two-factor ANOVA *(Coming Soon)*

#### 13 - Nested ANOVAs
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_13/13_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_13/13_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_9_lmm/09_homework_lmm.qmd)
* 📖 Vignette: Linear Mixed Models *(Coming Soon)*
:::

---

### Week 8: GLMs
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 14 - GLM and Logistic Regression
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_14/14_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_14/14_class_activity.qmd)
* 📖 Vignette: PCA *(Coming Soon)*

#### 15 - ANCOVA - Analysis of Covariance
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_15/15_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_15/15_class_activity.qmd)
* [💻 Homework](homeworks/hw_10_ancova/10_homework_ancova.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 9: Multivariate Analysis
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 16 - Multivariate Statistics
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_16/16_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_16/16_class_activity.qmd)
* 📖 Vignette: NMDS *(Coming Soon)*

#### 17 - Principal Component Analysis
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_17/17_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_17/17_class_activity.qmd)
:::

---

### Week 10: Review & Finals
::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### 18 - NMDS - Cluster Analysis
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_18/18_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
* [📋 Activity](activities/lecture_18/18_class_activity.qmd)

#### 19 - Review
* [🖥️ Lecture](lectures/lecture_19/19_lecture_powerpoint.qmd)
:::

:::
